title: Sanctuary AI Achieves 99.5%+ Success Rate on Wire Plugging Task
summary:
Sanctuary AI has achieved world-class performance on a complex wire plugging production task with a global Tier 1 automotive supplier.

In this demonstration, Sanctuary AI's Physical AI successfully performs a high-speed wire plug insertion task, achieving a validated task success rate of over 99.5% with a cycle time of just 2.54 seconds, meeting live production benchmarks established by the customer.

This milestone reflects Sanctuary AI's evolving strategy to deploy its Physical AI across existing and next-generation industrial robotic systems. By taking a hardware-agnostic approach, Sanctuary AI can accelerate the adoption of intelligent automation today while laying the foundation for the future of industrial robotics, including humanoid systems.

Learn more at www.sanctuary.ai
